steps.title: Identify the claim to support
steps.content: The underlined claim says Primeval and Other Times resembles magical realist novels by juxtaposing literary realism with Polish folklore. The supporting quotation must show both realism and folklore placed together. A merely general reference to folklore is not enough by itself.

steps.title: Find the direct support
steps.content: Choice A directly says a realistic plot is disrupted by Polish folklore. Choice B shifts to Latin American influence. Choice C mentions folkloric influence but not a realism-folklore juxtaposition. Choice D mentions alternation without clearly connecting realism to folklore. The answer is A.
